chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ تَكُونُ لِوَلَدِهِ الْجَارِيَةُ يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 112 – The man whose son happens to have a slave girl, so he intends to sleep with her

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) رَجُلٌ تَكُونُ لِبَعْضِ وُلْدِهِ جَارِيَةٌ وَ وُلْدُهُ صِغَارٌ فَقَالَ لَا يَصْلُحُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا حَتَّى يُقَوِّمَهَا قِيمَةَ عَدْلٍ ثُمَّ يَأْخُذَهَا وَ يَكُونُ لِوَلَدِهِ عَلَيْهِ ثَمَنُهَ.

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Dawood Bin Sirhan who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, a man, there happens to be a slave girl for one of his son, and his son is young. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It is not correct that he sleeps with her until he evaluates her with a just price, then takes her, and there would happen to be upon him, for his son, its price’.
